lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har jan sangat paavai paar |
lines.english: Associating with the humble servants of the Lord, they are carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਖਾਣਾ ਪੀਣਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhau khaanaa peenaa sukh saar |
lines.english: Those who eat and drink the Fear of God, find the most excellent peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਹੈ ਸਾਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad karanee hai saar |7|
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is the most excellent occupation. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਬੋਲੈ ਬੋਲਾਵੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach bolai bolaavai piaar |
lines.english: They speak the Truth, and lovingly inspire others to speak it as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਕਰਮੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਪਤਿ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jas karam dharam pat poojaa |
lines.english: Those who take the Lord's Praises as their karma and Dharma, their honor and worship service

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਤਉ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ras chaakhiaa tau man bheejaa |
lines.english: They taste the sublime essence of the Lord, and their minds are drenched with it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਅਗਨੀ ਮਹਿ ਭੂੰਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh aganee meh bhoonjaa |
lines.english: their sexual desire and anger are burnt off in the fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam jap antar poojaa |
lines.english: Chant the Lord's Name, and worship Him deep within your being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੮॥੫॥
lines.translit: pranavat naanak avar na doojaa |8|5|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, there is no other at all. ||8||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਕਿਸੁ ਪੂਜ ਚੜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avar na deesai kis pooj charraaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I do not see any other; unto whom should I offer worship? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭ ਠਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eko rav rahiaa sabh tthaaee |
lines.english: The One is pervading all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gurasabad veechaar avar nahee doojaa |1|
lines.english: Contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and no other. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਖਹੁ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau rakhahu aradaas |2|
lines.english: As it pleases You, You save me, Lord; this is my prayer. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਆਗੈ ਜੀਅੜਾ ਤੁਝ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan aagai jeearraa tujh paas |
lines.english: I place my mind and body in offering before You; I dedicate my soul to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sach jihavaa har rasan rasaaee |
lines.english: True is that tongue which is delighted by the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਛੂਟਸਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramat chhoottas prabh saranaaee |3|
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, one is saved in the Sanctuary of God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਕੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam prabh merai kee |
lines.english: My God created religious rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai vas chaar padaarath |
lines.english: The four great blessings are under the control of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਰਮਾਂ ਕੀਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam vaddaaee sir karamaan kee |4|
lines.english: He placed the glory of the Naam above these rituals. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਸਮਾਏ ਏਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਤਾਰਥ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: teen samaae ek kritaarath |5|
lines.english: When the first three are put aside, one is blessed with the fourth. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal gur boojh bujhaaee |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are cooled and soothed; the Guru imparts this understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਏ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਧਿਆਨਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: satigur dee mukat dhiaanaan |
lines.english: Those whom the True Guru blesses with liberation and meditation

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪਦੁ ਚੀਨੑਿ ਭਏ ਪਰਧਾਨਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har pad cheena bhe paradhaanaa |6|
lines.english: realize the Lord's State, and become sublime. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak gur boojh bujhaaee |
lines.english: Says Nanak, the Guru has imparted this understanding;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਗਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੮॥੬॥
lines.translit: naam binaa gat kinai na paaee |8|6|
lines.english: without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, no one is emancipated. ||8||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਵਾਜੇ ਕਿਨਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: prabh nivaaje kin keemat paaee |7|
lines.english: Who can estimate the value of those whom God has exalted? ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਦੁਖ ਬਿਸਰੇ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har rang raate sadaa rang saachaa dukh bisare pat paaee |1|
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Love of the Lord are imbued with Truth forever; their pains are dispelled, and they obtain honor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਚੀ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik dhur bakhas le gur poorai sachee banat banaaee |
lines.english: Some are forgiven by the Primal Lord God; the Perfect Guru makes the true making.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸਤ ਬਾਰ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: binasat baar na laagai kaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They shall disappear in no time at all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਕੀ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthee duramat kee chaturaaee |
lines.english: False are the clever tricks of the evil-minded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਵਿਆਪਸਿ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kau dukh darad viaapas manamukh dukh na jaaee |
lines.english: Pain and suffering afflict the self-willed manmukh. The pains of the self-willed manmukh shall never depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਦੁਖ ਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਏ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sukh dukh daataa guramukh jaataa mel le saranaaee |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukh recognizes the Giver of pleasure and pain. He merges in His Sanctuary. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਅਭ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਸਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਪਚਹਿ ਦਿਵਾਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh te abh bhagat na hovas haumai pacheh divaane |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not know loving devotional worship; they are insane, rotting away in their egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਖਿਨੁ ਊਭਿ ਪਇਆਲੀ ਜਬ ਲਗਿ ਸਬਦ ਨ ਜਾਨੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eihu manooaa khin aoobh peaalee jab lag sabad na jaane |3|
lines.english: This mind flies in an instant from the heavens to the underworld, as long as it does not know the Word of the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਖ ਪਿਆਸਾ ਜਗੁ ਭਇਆ ਤਿਪਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhookh piaasaa jag bheaa tipat nahee bin satigur paae |
lines.english: The world has become hungry and thirsty; without the True Guru, it is not satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੈ ਸਹਜੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sahajai sehaj milai sukh paaeeai daragah paidhaa jaae |4|
lines.english: Merging intuitively in the Celestial Lord, peace is obtained, and one goes to the Lord's Court wearing robes of honor. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹ ਦਾਨਾ ਬੀਨਾ ਇਕੁ ਆਪੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: daragah daanaa beenaa ik aape niramal gur kee baanee |
lines.english: The Lord in His Court is Himself the Knower and Seer; the Word of the Guru's Bani is Immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲੁ ਤਰੰਗ ਅਗਨੀ ਪਵਨੈ ਫੁਨਿ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jal tarang aganee pavanai fun trai mil jagat upaaeaa |
lines.english: He made the waves of water, the fire and the air, and then joined the three together to form the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੁਰਤਾ ਸਚੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਸਿ ਆਪੇ ਬੂਝੈ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape surataa sach veechaaras aape boojhai pad nirabaanee |5|
lines.english: He Himself is the Awareness of Truth; He Himself understands the state of nirvaanaa. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਬਲੁ ਛਲੁ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਦੀਆ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aisaa bal chhal tin kau deea hukamee tthaak rahaaeaa |6|
lines.english: He blessed these elements with such power, that they remain subject to His Command. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਜਨ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਜਗ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਪਰਖਿ ਖਜਾਨੈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aise jan virale jag andar parakh khajaanai paaeaa |
lines.english: How rare are those humble beings in this world, whom the Lord tests and places in His Treasury.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਤਿ ਵਰਨ ਤੇ ਭਏ ਅਤੀਤਾ ਮਮਤਾ ਲੋਭੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jaat varan te bhe ateetaa mamataa lobh chukaaeaa |7|
lines.english: They rise above social status and color, and rid themselves of possessiveness and greed. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਪਖਾਲੈ ਜਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੮॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak tin ke charan pakhaalai jinaa guramukh saachaa bhaaeaa |8|7|
lines.english: Nanak washes the feet of those who, as Gurmukh, love the True Lord. ||8||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਤੀਰਥ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਦੁਖੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam rate teerath se niramal dukh haumai mail chukaaeaa |
lines.english: Attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, they are like immaculate sacred shrines; they are rid of the pain and pollution of egotism.
